gmcm.enable-mod.name: Enable mod
gmcm.enable-mod.tooltip: If enabled, farm animals are passable and the farmer can walk through them.
gmcm.enable-nudge.name: Enable nudge
gmcm.enable-nudge.tooltip: If enabled, animals are visually shoved aside when you walk through them.
gmcm.nudge-strength.name: Nudge strength
gmcm.nudge-strength.tooltip: How far animals visually move out of the way.
gmcm.nudge-duration.name: Nudge duration
gmcm.nudge-duration.tooltip: How long the visual nudge animation lasts.
gmcm.nudge-cooldown.name: Nudge cooldown
gmcm.nudge-cooldown.tooltip: Minimum delay before the same animal can be nudged again.
